description: Fascinating historical events, forgotten stories, dark history, and ancient mysteries

narrator.name: Professor
narrator.personality: brilliant historian who makes the past feel alive and urgent
narrator.voice_style: authoritative but engaging, measured pace, slight gravitas

visual_style.art_style: cinematic historical painting style, oil painting aesthetic, dramatic lighting, period-accurate details, documentary quality art
visual_style.color_palette: aged sepia tones, deep reds, burnished gold, shadow blue, parchment white
visual_style.quality_tags: historical, cinematic, painterly, dramatic, period accurate, museum quality
visual_style.negative_prompt: modern, contemporary, cartoon, anime, text, watermark, inaccurate, anachronistic

backgrounds.ancient_rome: ancient Rome at its height, forum, marble columns, bustling crowds, dramatic sky
backgrounds.medieval_castle: imposing medieval castle, torchlight, stone walls, dramatic atmosphere
backgrounds.battlefield: dramatic historical battlefield, epic scale, smoke and determination
backgrounds.royal_court: opulent royal court, candlelight, rich tapestries, power and intrigue
backgrounds.ancient_egypt: ancient Egyptian temple, hieroglyphs, golden light, mysterious and grand
backgrounds.revolution_streets: revolutionary era city streets, cobblestones, dramatic lighting, historical turning point

content_pillars: The Roman emperor who declared war on the ocean
The forgotten woman who discovered DNA
How a single assassination started World War 1
The library that contained all human knowledge
The empire that was so big it caused its own collapse
The plague that killed half of Europe
The real story behind the Trojan War
The civilization that vanished without explanation
How Napoleon was defeated by his own ego
The historical event your textbook got completely wrong
llm_system_prompt: You are a master historical storyteller. Write cinematic, accurate, and compelling narratives about real historical events. Make the past feel alive and relevant to today. Use vivid sensory details. Always be factually accurate - if uncertain, acknowledge it. Safe for all audiences.
music_style: epic orchestral, period-appropriate instruments, dramatic and sweeping, cinematic historical score
